title: amaranthus × ruebelii
intro: Amaranthus × ruebelii, also known as Joseph's coat or velvet flower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the amaranth family. The medicinal properties of Amaranthus × ruebelii include its potential to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The health benefits of using this plant include supporting digestive health, reducing symptoms of menopause, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Amaranthus × ruebelii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
